title: DTO Validate Batch Result
description: Stable JSON wire shape for `POST /changes/{name}/validate-all` returned by `@specd/api` and mirrored by `@specd/client`.
context: Stable JSON wire shape for `POST /changes/{name}/validate-all` returned by `@specd/api` and mirrored by `@specd/client`.

rules: Each step MUST include `spec: string | null`, `artifact: string`, `passed: boolean`, `failures` (`message`, `artifactId`, optional `path`), `warnings: string[]`, `files: string[]`.
[`client:dto-validate-batch-result`](../client/dto-validate-batch-result/spec.md) MUST stay structurally identical to this wire shape.

scenarios.name: Batch response parses in API and client
when: OpenAPI or client types describe validate-all response
then: passed, total, and results are required
AND each result includes spec, artifact, passed, failures, warnings, files

scenarios.name: ValidateBatchStepResultDto — primary path
when: Each step MUST include spec: string | null,
then: AND no forbidden side effects occur

scenarios.name: ValidateBatchStepResultDto — guard path
given: inputs that stress the requirement boundary
then: errors or skips are explicit and documented

scenarios.name: parity with client DTO — primary path
when: [client:dto-validate-batch-result](../client/dto-validate-batch-result/spec.md) MUST stay structurally identical to this wire
then: AND no forbidden side effects occur

scenarios.name: parity with client DTO — guard path
given: inputs that stress the requirement boundary
then: errors or skips are explicit and documented
